nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chaetorhynchus
nodes.summary: Chaetorhynchus（Chaetorhynchus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Drongo fantail。

nodes.name: Drongo fantail
nodes.summary: Drongo fantail（Chaetorhynchus papuensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Drongo fantail。

nodes.name: Drongo fantail
nodes.summary: The drongo fantail (Chaetorhynchus papuensis), also known as the pygmy drongo, is a species of passerine bird endemic to the island of New Guinea. It is the only species in the genus Chaetorhynchus. The species was long placed within the drongo family Dicruridae, but it differs from others in that family in having twelve rectrices instead of ten. Molecular analysis also supports moving the species out from the drongo family, instead placing it as a sister species to the silktail of Fiji, and both those species in the fantail family Rhipiduridae. References External links Image at ADW Archived 2008-12-02 at the Wayback Machine
